questions.text: How many senses does our body have?
questions.explanation: We have 5 senses: sight, hearing, smell, taste and touch.

questions.text: Which part of the body helps us to think?
questions.explanation: The brain helps us think and remember.

questions.text: We touch and feel things with our ____.
questions.explanation: We feel touch with our skin.

questions.text: We should bathe every day to stay clean.
questions.explanation: Bathing daily keeps us clean and healthy. True.

questions.text: Which part of the plant makes food?
questions.explanation: Leaves make food using sunlight.

questions.text: Which of these is a creeper?
questions.explanation: Money plant is a creeper that needs support to climb.

questions.text: The ____ holds the plant in the soil.
questions.explanation: Roots hold the plant in the soil and take water.

questions.text: We get vegetables from plants.
questions.explanation: Many vegetables come from plants. True.

questions.text: Which animal is a wild animal?
questions.explanation: A tiger is a wild animal that lives in the jungle.

questions.text: Which animal lays eggs?
questions.explanation: A hen lays eggs.

questions.text: A ____ is a pet animal that guards our home.
questions.explanation: A dog is a pet that guards the house.

questions.text: A fish breathes through gills.
questions.explanation: Fish breathe through gills in water. True.

questions.text: Which food gives us energy to play?
questions.explanation: Foods like rice and roti give us energy.

questions.text: Which of these is a green vegetable?
questions.explanation: Spinach (palak) is a green leafy vegetable.

questions.text: We should eat ____ and vegetables to stay healthy.
questions.explanation: Fruits and vegetables keep us healthy.

questions.text: Drinking milk makes our bones strong.
questions.explanation: Milk has calcium that makes bones strong. True.

questions.text: In which form is water when it freezes?
questions.explanation: When water freezes it becomes ice (solid).

questions.text: We should ____ water and not waste it.
questions.explanation: We should save water.

questions.text: Plants and animals need water to live.
questions.explanation: All living things need water. True.

questions.text: Which season is cold?
questions.explanation: Winter is the cold season.

questions.text: What do we use to dry wet clothes quickly?
questions.explanation: Sunlight and air dry wet clothes.

questions.text: Moving air is called ____.
questions.explanation: Moving air is called wind.

questions.text: It rains in the rainy season.
questions.explanation: The rainy season brings rain. True.

questions.text: Which is a water transport?
questions.explanation: A ship travels on water.

questions.text: Which one travels on rails?
questions.explanation: A train travels on railway tracks (rails).

questions.text: We wear a ____ for safety while riding a bike.
questions.explanation: We wear a helmet for safety on a bike.

questions.text: An aeroplane travels in the air.
questions.explanation: An aeroplane flies in the air. True.

questions.text: Your mother's brother is your ____.
questions.explanation: Your mother's brother is your mama (uncle).

questions.text: A family that has parents, children, grandparents living together is a ____ family.
questions.explanation: When many members live together it is a joint family.

questions.text: We should plant more trees to keep the air clean.
questions.explanation: Trees clean the air and give oxygen. True.

questions.text: What should we do with waste paper and plastic?
questions.explanation: Waste should be put in a dustbin to keep surroundings clean.

questions.text: Diwali is celebrated with lamps and sweets.
questions.explanation: Diwali is celebrated with diyas (lamps) and sweets. True.
